code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_space_at(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    while i < n and is_space_at(s, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    let start = i
    while i < n and not is_space_at(s, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if start < i
      let tok = string.substring(s, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(x)
        result = list.push(result, x)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
  end
  result
end

fn intersect(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  for x in a
    if list.contains(b, x) and not list.contains(result, x)
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  for y in sorted
    if not inserted and x <= y
      out = list.push(out, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    out = list.push(out, y)
  end
  if not inserted
    out = list.push(out, x)
  end
  out
end

fn sort_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  for x in xs
    out = insert_sorted(out, x)
  end
  out
end

fn read_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = read_or_empty()
  let line2 = read_or_empty()
  let a = parse_line(line1)
  let b = parse_line(line2)
  let inter = intersect(a, b)
  let sorted = sort_list(inter)
  let n = sorted.len()
  if n == 0
    println("empty")
  else
    mut s = ""
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      match sorted.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        if i == 0
          s = "#{v}"
        else
          s = "#{s} #{v}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(s)
  end
end
